name: Trial of Mercy
description: The temple's inner court presents a harrowing illusion: a wounded knight kneels before you, begging for the mercy of a swift end, while a weeping child clutches at your sleeve, pleading for you to save him. The Grail's light watches from above, judging not your strength but the quality of your compassion.
failureConsequence: The illusion fades and the Grail's light dims to a cold ember. You are left standing in an empty courtyard, the way forward barred until you understand what mercy truly asks.
